steps.title: Perpendicular lines have negative reciprocal slopes
steps.content: Line $k$ has slope $-\dfrac{4}{3}$. Flip and negate to get line $j$'s slope: $m_j = \dfrac{3}{4}$.

steps.title: Use point-slope form with $(-20, -23)$
steps.content:
$$y + 23 = \frac{3}{4}(x + 20) \implies y = \frac{3}{4}x + 15 - 23 = \frac{3}{4}x - 8$$
That matches choice A — A is correct.
